Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.regression

Class ViscosityDataPoint

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.regression.ViscosityDataPoint
public class ViscosityDataPoint extends Object
Experimental viscosity data point for PVT regression.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

    • pressure

      private double pressure

    • temperature

      private double temperature

    • phaseName

      private String phaseName

  • Constructor Details

    • ViscosityDataPoint

      public ViscosityDataPoint(double pressure, double temperature, double viscosity, String phaseName)
      Create a viscosity data point.
      Parameters:
      pressure - pressure in bara
      temperature - temperature in K
      viscosity - dynamic viscosity in Pa s
      phaseName - phase name: gas, oil, liquid, aqueous, or water
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if phaseName is null or empty

  • Method Details

    • getPressure

      public double getPressure()
      Get pressure.
      Returns:
      pressure in bara

    • getTemperature

      public double getTemperature()
      Get temperature.
      Returns:
      temperature in K

    • getViscosity

      public double getViscosity()
      Get experimental dynamic viscosity.
      Returns:
      viscosity in Pa s

    • getPhaseName

      public String getPhaseName()
      Get phase name.
      Returns:
      phase name for this viscosity measurement

    • getPhaseIndex

      public int getPhaseIndex()
      Get the regression property index for the phase name.
      Returns:
      property index used by PVTRegressionFunction
